approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

book_no.text: เลขที่หนังสือ

book_date.text: วันที่ลงหนังสือ

root.sql: SELECT pka_mem_newmem.fp_member_name(sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no) as memname ,sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code) as district ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code) as province ,sc_mem_m_ucf_district.post_code as postcode ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,'!book_no_1!' as book_no ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( '!book_date_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as book_date ,'!libery_1!' as libery ,'!meet_1!' as meet ,'!years_1!' as years , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( '!meet_date_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as meet_date ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_month_name('!month_1!') as month -- , sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode as post_code FROM sc_mem_m_application_form ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_district WHERE (sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) AND (sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no) and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code /*WHERE*/
